briefing.headline: Rig up a Texas Rig — finesse pre-spawn approach for clear water.
briefing.gameplan:
The Texas Rig is a strong choice for pre-spawn with clear water and post frontal conditions.

Wheeler: Peg the sinker on baits with a lot of action (craw-style); leave it unpegged on gliding-action baits like tubes so the weight slides away for better glide.

Key adjustment for post frontal: slow down significantly — extended pauses, subtle movements, finesse presentations.

primaryApproach.retrieve: Wheeler: Peg the sinker on baits with a lot of action (craw-style); leave it unpegged on gliding-action baits like tubes so the weight slides away for better glide.
primaryApproach.targets: Focus on grass, flat, riprap. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

alternateApproach.targets: Focus on grass, flat, riprap. Work the transitions and edges where structure changes.

proInsights.insight: DeFronzo: Crimp a small split shot 18 inches above a size 1 hook with a 3-inch Ika Texas-rigged; keep a slow steady retrieve; effective up to 20ft — deeper than that you lose contact; add a grub guard for bottom snags and weed penetration; a glass...

KVD: For pitching into grass holes — 3/8oz tungsten weight with a 3/0 Mustad grip pin hook (the pin keeps the bait from sliding down). 5-inch Ocho worm. Blue craw or green pumpkin. Making it fall straight is critical — the Texas rig glides down cl...

Wheeler: The Punch Out Craw has five manifestations - full glide bait on 4/0 hook and 1/2-oz sinker, separated claws for football jig or Biffle Hardhead, trimmed small craw for swim jig/flipping jig/chatterbait/shakyhead, shortened torso for even ...

briefing.depthStrategy: Post-frontal pre-spawn fish pull back to 6-12ft staging areas. They won't commit shallow after the front. Target the first breakline off spawning flats and key on deeper structure near shallow spawning zones.
adjustIf: If skies cloud up and wind picks up, re-introduce moving baits — the reprieve from high pressure activates fish
If water clarity decreases from wind or rain, upsize and switch to brighter colors
If bites dry up, try shaking in place for 10-15 seconds before moving — patience pays with plastics
